settings.life.card.reset.desc: Clear all current life data and return to the initial state

settings.life.reset.confirm.title: Confirm Reset
settings.life.reset.confirm.message: Reset all life data? This will clear all states, items and effects and cannot be undone.

life.debug.card.items.desc: Grant specific items or directly set inventory counts

life.events.card.title: Event Triggers
life.events.card.desc: Select an event to trigger and see the random results
life.events.result.title: Recent Results
life.events.result.desc: Shows the results of the most recent event trigger
life.events.fire_dead: Pet is dead, cannot fire this event
life.events.fire_tag_restricted: Pet is in critical condition, only emergency events can be triggered
life.events.fire_on_cooldown: This event needs {seconds}s more before it can be triggered again
life.events.fire_mutex_blocked: This event is mutex-locked ({trigger} on cooldown)
life.events.fire_has_item: Cannot trigger: already have {item} in inventory
life.events.fire_executing: This event is currently running, please wait
life.search.placeholder: Name only; @ for ID; # for details; space splits terms, use _ for spaces
life.search.advanced_tip:
Advanced search:
- Plain text: name only
- @term: search ID
- #term: search details
- Space: split multiple terms
- _: replace spaces inside one term
life.trigger.explore_park.name: Visit Park
life.trigger.explore_park.desc: Take {character_name} for a walk in the park. Costs some energy.
life.trigger.read_book.name: Read
life.trigger.read_book.desc: Quietly read a book to gain insight. Costs some psc.
life.trigger.chat_with_friend.name: Chat with Friend
life.trigger.chat_with_friend.desc: Call a friend and catch up on life.
life.trigger.cook_meal.name: Cook a Meal
life.trigger.cook_meal.desc: Cook a simple meal in the kitchen and see how it turns out.
life.trigger.tidy_room.name: Tidy Room
life.trigger.tidy_room.desc: Clean up the room for a refreshing environment.
life.trigger.draw_picture.name: Draw a Picture
life.trigger.draw_picture.desc: Pick up a brush and draw whatever comes to mind.
life.trigger.write_diary.name: Write Diary
life.trigger.write_diary.desc: Record what happened today and sort out your thoughts.
life.trigger.register_library_card.name: Apply for Library Card
life.trigger.register_library_card.desc: Go to the library counter and apply for a card. Only available when you do not have one.
life.trigger.study_in_library.name: Study in Library
life.trigger.study_in_library.desc: Use your library card to enter and study. Improves focus but costs energy.
life.outcome.park_find_flower.name: Found a Flower
life.outcome.park_find_flower.desc: {character_name} found a pretty flower in the grass, feeling happy.
life.outcome.park_meet_cat.name: Met a Cat
life.outcome.park_meet_cat.desc: A little cat came over and nuzzled {character_name}, feeling great!
life.outcome.park_fresh_air.name: Fresh Air
life.outcome.park_fresh_air.desc: The park air is so fresh, {character_name} feels invigorated.
life.outcome.book_insight.name: Insight
life.outcome.book_insight.desc: Gained new insight from reading, feeling refreshed.
life.outcome.book_boring.name: Boring
life.outcome.book_boring.desc: This book was too boring, {character_name} yawned.
life.outcome.friend_happy_chat.name: Happy Chat
life.outcome.friend_happy_chat.desc: Had a great chat with a friend, {character_name} feels cared for.
life.outcome.friend_gossip.name: Gossip Time
life.outcome.friend_gossip.desc: Friend shared some fun gossip, {character_name} was amused.
life.outcome.cook_delicious.name: Delicious Meal
life.outcome.cook_delicious.desc: Made a wonderful dish, {character_name} is very satisfied!
life.outcome.cook_burnt.name: Burnt Food
life.outcome.cook_burnt.desc: Accidentally burnt the food… {character_name} is a bit down.
life.outcome.tidy_found_item.name: Unexpected Find
life.outcome.tidy_found_item.desc: Found something interesting in the corner, {character_name}'s eyes lit up.
life.outcome.tidy_refreshed.name: Refreshed
life.outcome.tidy_refreshed.desc: The room looks brand new, {character_name} feels much better.
life.outcome.draw_masterpiece.name: Masterpiece
life.outcome.draw_masterpiece.desc: {character_name} was struck by inspiration and created a stunning work of art!
life.outcome.draw_fun_doodle.name: Fun Doodle
life.outcome.draw_fun_doodle.desc: Not a masterpiece, but {character_name} drew some cute doodles and had fun.
life.outcome.draw_mess.name: A Mess
life.outcome.draw_mess.desc: Paint everywhere, {character_name} made a total mess of the paper…
life.outcome.diary_reflect.name: Deep Reflection
life.outcome.diary_reflect.desc: While writing, {character_name} gained new understanding of recent events.
life.outcome.diary_nostalgia.name: Nostalgia
life.outcome.diary_nostalgia.desc: Looking through old diary entries, {character_name} drifted into fond memories.
life.outcome.library_card_registered.des: The library card is ready. {character_name} can now study in the library.
life.outcome.library_quiet_focus.name: Quiet Focus
life.outcome.library_quiet_focus.desc: The calm library atmosphere helps {character_name} quickly enter a focused state.
life.death.title: Pet Has Died
life.death.subtitle: The raising session has ended
life.death.reset_hint: Go to Settings → Life Management to reset and start over
settings.life.reset.dead_warn: The pet has died and all functions are paused. Reset the raising data to revive.
life.item.glucose_iv.name: Glucose IV Solution
life.item.glucose_iv.desc: Intravenous glucose infusion that continuously replenishes hydration and energy. An emergency supply for critical conditions.
life.buff.glucose_iv_drip.name: Glucose IV Drip
life.buff.glucose_iv_drip.desc: Receiving glucose infusion, steadily restoring hydration and satiety.
life.buff.hospitalized.name: Hospitalized
life.buff.hospitalized.desc: Receiving hospital treatment, comprehensively restoring body condition and improving vitality.
life.trigger.hospitalization.name: Hospitalization
life.trigger.hospitalization.desc: Admitted to hospital for treatment. Takes a long time to recover, but comprehensively improves health.
